requirement_topic.en: O'zstandart Mandatory Conformity Certificate for EV Charger Safety
requirement_topic.zh: O'zstandart电动汽车充电设备安全强制合格证书
requirement_topic.zht: O'zstandart電動汽車充電設備安全強制合格證書

summary.en: Uzbekistan is not a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU) and does not use the EAC TR CU conformity system as its mandatory market-access route. The domestic route is O'zstandart — the Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation and Metrology — which issues mandatory conformity certificates for regulated electrical products under O'z DSt national standards, harmonised GOST standards, and IEC-aligned references. EV charging equipment placed on the Uzbekistan market requires an O'zstandart mandatory conformity certificate where it falls within the scope of regulated electrical product categories. The dossier should address electrical shock protection, insulation, overheating, mechanical hazards, marking, instructions, and conformity documentation for the exact AC or DC charger configuration.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦不是欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员国，其强制市场准入路径不使用EAC TR CU合格评定体系。国内路径是O'zstandart——乌兹别克斯坦技术法规和计量署——依据O'z DSt国家标准、协调化GOST标准和IEC参照对受监管电气产品颁发强制合格证书。在乌兹别克斯坦市场投放的电动汽车充电设备，若落入受监管电气产品类别范围，须取得O'zstandart强制合格证书。资料包应覆盖具体交流或直流充电设备配置的防触电、绝缘、过热、机械危险、标识、说明书和合格证明文件。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦不是歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員國，其強制市場准入路徑不使用EAC TR CU合格評定體系。國內路徑是O'zstandart——烏茲別克斯坦技術法規和計量署——依據O'z DSt國家標準、協調化GOST標準和IEC參照對受監管電氣產品頒發強制合格證書。在烏茲別克斯坦市場投放的電動汽車充電設備，若落入受監管電氣產品類別範圍，須取得O'zstandart強制合格證書。資料包應覆蓋具體交流或直流充電設備配置的防觸電、絕緣、過熱、機械危險、標識、說明書和合格證明文件。

standards_or_laws: O'zstandart (Agency for Technical Regulation and Metrology) mandatory conformity requirements
O'z DSt national standards for electrical safety where adopted
GOST standards harmonised in Uzbekistan for low-voltage and high-voltage equipment where applicable
IEC 61851-1 (general EV conductive charging system requirements)
Uzbekistan import and market-surveillance requirements for regulated electrical products

summary.en: Chinese EV charger safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 18487.2 where applicable, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication where applicable, factory safety tests, CB or IEC reports, and component certificates. This evidence can support the O'zstandart dossier but is not an O'zstandart mandatory conformity certificate by itself. Do not assume an EAC certificate covers Uzbekistan — it does not.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备安全证据通常包括GB/T 18487.1-2023、适用时的GB/T 18487.2、适用时的GB/T 27930-2023直流通信、工厂安全测试、CB或IEC报告以及部件证书。这些证据可支持O'zstandart资料包，但本身不是O'zstandart强制合格证书。切勿假定EAC证书覆盖乌兹别克斯坦——实际上并不覆盖。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備安全證據通常包括GB/T 18487.1-2023、適用時的GB/T 18487.2、適用時的GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊、工廠安全測試、CB或IEC報告以及部件證書。這些證據可支持O'zstandart資料包，但本身不是O'zstandart強制合格證書。切勿假定EAC證書覆蓋烏茲別克斯坦——實際上並不覆蓋。

gap.en: Confirm product scope, voltage rating, charger type, and O'zstandart conformity route before shipment. Prepare Uzbek-language and Russian-language labels and manuals where required, safety risk analysis, bill of materials, test reports mapping to O'z DSt / GOST / IEC references, conformity certificate application, and importer authorization. Do not rely on an EAC certificate as a substitute — Uzbekistan is an EAEU observer only and EAC is not the mandatory domestic route.
gap.zh: 出货前应确认产品范围、电压等级、充电设备类型和O'zstandart合格评定路径。应准备乌兹别克语和俄语标签及手册（如有要求）、安全风险分析、物料清单、映射至O'z DSt/GOST/IEC参照的测试报告、合格证书申请文件和进口商授权。切勿以EAC证书代替——乌兹别克斯坦仅为EAEU观察员，EAC不是强制国内路径。
gap.zht: 出貨前應確認產品範圍、電壓等級、充電設備類型和O'zstandart合格評定路徑。應準備烏茲別克語和俄語標籤及手冊（如有要求）、安全風險分析、物料清單、映射至O'z DSt/GOST/IEC參照的測試報告、合格證書申請文件和進口商授權。切勿以EAC證書代替——烏茲別克斯坦僅為EAEU觀察員，EAC不是強制國內路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the charger is within O'zstandart mandatory conformity scope and is placed on the Uzbekistan market; EAC certification is NOT the legal route for Uzbekistan
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or procurement-specific depending on Chinese product category, charger configuration, and project route

source.publisher: O'zstandart — Agency for Technical Regulation and Metrology of the Republic of Uzbekistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China GB/T safety evidence supports technical review, but Uzbekistan market placement requires an O'zstandart mandatory conformity certificate route. EAC certification is not applicable — Uzbekistan is not an EAEU member.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T安全证据可支持技术审查，但乌兹别克斯坦市场投放需要O'zstandart强制合格证书路径。EAC认证不适用——乌兹别克斯坦不是EAEU成员国。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T安全證據可支持技術審查，但烏茲別克斯坦市場投放需要O'zstandart強制合格證書路徑。EAC認證不適用——烏茲別克斯坦不是EAEU成員國。
